group_label: cell types located in pancreas data sets
group_name: CELL TYPES LOCATED IN PANCREAS DATA SETS
source_rationale: This analysis establishes an active range between 0 and 2,500 counts per 10,000 unique molecular identifiers as an active range for Ins1 expression in mice, with all expressing cell types located in pancreas data sets.

_verification.group_label_reconstructed: cell types located in pancreas data sets

source_rationale: As an example, we investigated the correlation of two cell-cycle-associated genes, Mcm5 and Pcna (Fig. 2b), which provides a range for their correlation and an estimate of how often these genes are correlated across tissues.
